notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

Source directly supports that Fang Yuan informed Lang Ya land spirit about Feng Jiu Ge's move 'Fu Ge' beforehand. This is private knowledge between Fang Yuan and Lang Ya land spirit, not known to Feng Jiu Ge (who is surprised). Atomic fact, no speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows Feng Jiuge attacking Lang Ya blessed land and Lang Ya land spirit chasing him, but the motives behind Feng Jiuge's attack (e.g., orders from Heaven Court, personal vendetta) are not directly stated. Lang Ya land spirit's rage is visible but his deeper motive (defending territory, revenge for毛民 casualties) is ambiguous. Only observable actions are present; any inferred motive would be a psychological leap without direct source support.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
琅琊派作为四族联盟核心，正遭受中洲天庭（凤九歌为代表）的进攻，凤九歌攻击黑毛大陆城池，琅琊地灵驱使银色巨人反击，琅琊派启动隐藏蛊阵击杀多位中洲蛊仙。方源提前提供了凤九歌的情报，琅琊派有准备。这是明确的集体（琅琊派）面临的外部军事威胁压力。
IF export filter quarantined 7 legacy old-schema branches.
